profile_info_desc: Hi, I’m Alec Thompson, Decisions: If you can’t decide, the answer is no. If two equally difficult paths, choose the one more painful in the short term (pain avoidance is creating an illusion of equality).
project_1_desc: Music is something that everyone has their own specific opinion about.
project_2_desc: As Uber works through a huge amount of internal management turmoil.
project_3_desc: Different people have different taste, and various types of music.
project_4_desc: Why would anyone pick blue over pink? Pink is obviously a better color.
